headline: Price Prediction: Qualcomm Has Over 50% Upside as AI Data Center Push Accelerates
summary: Qualcomm just watched a massive post-Investor Day rally evaporate in weeks, leaving the stock flat on the year and investors questioning whether management's bold $40 billion non-handset target is a roadmap or a mirage.
